title: ruellia calvescens
intro: Ruellia calvescens, also known as Mexican petunia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ruellia calvescens include treating fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a remedy for wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Ruellia calvescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in folk medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
